Ad Text:
Senior Developer, Artificial Intelligence (AI)

Permanent Full-Time
Hybrid flexibility for work-life balance | Chatswood, St Leonards or Charlestown
Attractive salary, up to $150,222 + 12% Super + 17.5% annual leave loading
Up to 12 extra days off per year + 4 weeks annual leave
Increase your take home pay with salary packaging, meal allowance, fitness passport and more
Join the team enriching health in millions of ways every day through digital innovation

Applications Close: 11:59pm, Wednesday 8th April 2026


About Us
At eHealth NSW, we’re leading the digital transformation of Australia’s largest health system. As NSW Health’s digital centre of excellence, we design, build and support world-class ICT solutions that improve patient care across the state.

Guided by a Cloud First Strategy, we’re harnessing digital technology to better patient care and deliver scalable, quality, patient-centred, digital healthcare. With your skills and experience, you can help enrich the lives of millions while developing your career within Australia’s largest health organisation—alongside passionate tech professionals, health partners and industry leaders building solutions that truly make a difference.

About the Opportunity
AI is transforming our NSW Health system, and we are working to harness its use to address some of our most complex challenges so we can deliver safer, smarter and more connected care for the people of NSW.   

As the AI Senior Developer you will contribute to the design, development, testing and deployment of AI enabled solutions that support organisational objectives and customer outcomes. The role supports the delivery of secure, ethical and scalable AI capabilities, participates in agile delivery activities, and contributes to continuous improvement and learning within a multidisciplinary technology environment 

Reporting to the AI Product Manager this role will significantly contribute to the implementation of complex AI and data roadmap deliverables ensuring proposed solutions align with enterprise architecture standards, engineering patterns and strategic priorities. 

For more information, please refer to the Role Description 
 

About You

We are looking for someone with:

Experience communicating and collaborating effectively with multidisciplinary digital teams
Demonstrated experience contributing to agile delivery teams, participating in ceremonies such as stand ups, sprint planning, reviews and retrospectives.
Excellent knowledge of the software and AI development lifecycle, including agile methodologies, model development, testing, deployment and ongoing iteration.
Tertiary qualifications in Computer Science, Software Engineering/Development or Information Technology
